author: @BRYANN2K_dev
text:
🎮 @Promethee_io (https://t.co/rMvDntjDZ7)

Your work, turned into a game.

Quests, XP, guilds, rankings, everything you do becomes part of an RPG.

2k+ followers, growing fast. If you're a builder who loves gamification, this is your next rabbit hole.

included.text:
🪟 AeroSpace (https://t.co/MfCxTBDM49)

The #1 thing I missed from Linux: a tiling window manager that just works.

AeroSpace is i3-like for macOS. Keyboard-driven, dynamic tiling, workspaces, no mouse needed.

Compared to yabai (needs SIP disabled) and Amethyst (unstable), AeroSpace is the sweet spot. Open-source, free, actively maintained.

Install this first. Seriously.
